title: Newsletter View

posts.author: Amanda_W (Amanda Wax)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking for the ability to create a newsletter VIEW within a board or Dashboard.

I’m not talking about integrating with newsletter apps or notification automations.

My goal is to set up a new shared view for top leaders to see final outputs of things that were completed in a newsletter style, with deadline, complete date and final link. My top leaders dont need to see the details in the plans (too granular), but the dashboard views don’t show what I need (too high level).

Essentially i could share this newsletter view with them in a weekly basis and they could see all the items that were done/published over the week.

if this exists already can you point me in the right direction?
thanks!
